parameters.content:
# Message Debounce Buffer (30-second text burst window)

**What it does:** For the same customer, waits 12 seconds, then forwards only **one** winner execution and combines the newest **text burst** into one newline-joined string for upstream processing.

**Key fixes in this version**
1. Uses a **30-second** window instead of 12.
2. Uses **message id first** for winner detection, with timestamp/text fallback.
3. Combines from the **inbound-only timeline**, so a stray outbound does not break the burst.
4. Preserves `msgTextRaw` as the real latest single inbound turn.
5. Returns `msgText`, `text`, and `combinedTextFinal` as the debounced burst string.
6. Passes non-text/media turns safely as a single winner item.

**Parent workflow wiring**
- `Gate after Upsert` → `Run Message Debounce Buffer (30s)`
- `Run Message Debounce Buffer (30s)` → `Touch Session API`
- `Run Message Debounce Buffer (30s)` → `Gate after Touch` (passthrough input)
- `Touch Session API` → `Gate after Touch`

**Important**
- The parent must already have persisted the inbound message before calling this sub-workflow.
- The parent should pass `wa_id`, `msgId`, `msgText`, `msgTextRaw`, `tsMs`, and `tsIso`.
- This workflow is intentionally burst-aware for **text**; media turns still pass through safely as one winner item.30

nodes.name: Wait 35 Seconds
nodes.notes: Debounce window. Only the execution that still matches the latest persisted inbound after 12 seconds will continue.

assignments.name: chatId
assignments.value: ={{ $('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.chatId || $('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.wa_id }}

assignments.name: debouncedText
assignments.value: ={{ $('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.debouncedText || $('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.msgText }}

assignments.name: combinedTextFinal
assignments.value: ={{ $('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.combinedTextFinal || $('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.msgText }}

assignments.name: messageCount
assignments.value: ={{ Number($('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.messageCount || $('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.debounceCount || 1) }}

assignments.name: debounceCount
assignments.value: ={{ Number($('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.debounceCount || $('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.messageCount || 1) }}

assignments.name: debounceBurstStartedAtMs
assignments.value: ={{ Number($('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.debounceBurstStartedAtMs || $('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.tsMs || Date.now()) }}

assignments.name: debounceBurstEndedAtMs
assignments.value: ={{ Number($('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.debounceBurstEndedAtMs || $('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.tsMs || Date.now()) }}

assignments.name: tsMs
assignments.value: ={{ Number($('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.tsMs || $('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.debounceBurstEndedAtMs || Date.now()) }}

assignments.name: tsIso
assignments.value: ={{ $('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.tsIso || new Date($('Resolve Winner + Combine Burst').item.json.tsMs || Date.now()).toISOString() }}

nodes.name: Output Debounced Item
nodes.notes: Final node — returns the debounced winner payload to the parent while preserving all original fields.
